title: [PDF] Simone de Beauvoir, The Second Sex, 1949.
text:
[PDF] Simone de Beauvoir, The Second Sex, 1949.
The couple is a fundamental unity with its two halves riveted together, and the cleavage of society along the line of sex is impossible. Here is to be found 

In the same passage, to which the reader is referred, she states in general how certain existentialist concepts -- which, it may be remarked, in themselves.
